wired kindness.

root cause such mental illness lies lack inner peace.
become nothing short challenge stay calm sane.

truth that cannot denied that while want excel everything ultimate goal attain inner peace.

path getting inner peace paved kindness.
needs kind himself kind other human beings, animals even environment.
Being Kind when practiced consciously, help navigate through intense emotions like fear, jealousy, pain, anger.
Some people naturally kind most cultivate this quality within practicing this virtue daily basis.
want feel happy, more others.

will able love pure way.

fact that people look help, counseling, assistance makes feel more peace.

Setting goals your running smart should SMART Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Realistic Time-bound.
SMART criteria actually have their roots industry where common mnemonic guide people setting objectives.
While serving common tool project resource managers performance goals their team, application these criteria just applicable away from daily grind where goal oriented runner looking structure their personal pursuits.
SMART goals work?
Well pretty straight forward there some helpful guidance below.
Specific When goals, need specific opposed general.
make goals general they become some amorphous that provide structure focus that necessary achieve them.
good specific goal answer some standard questions "what," "where," sometimes even "why."
answer those questions have good data your goal.
example specific running goal would finish Chicago Marathon 2000 miles calendar year.
Measurable Effective goals have measurable otherwise know when have reached
That what makes quantitative goals much more effective than qualitative ones.
example, goal raising $5000 cancer awareness Seattle Marathon whole easier know achieved success than your goal around something un-quantifiable matter worthwhile such improving one's overall Chi.
That said, often when venturing into field, goals somewhat undefined minds easier qualitative goal.
that should take step back will find that your qualitative goal bounded quantitative goal.
years back when dusted running shoes first time long time achieve specific quantifiable goal rather mission "get healthier increase well being both physically emotionally" measurable goal that?
There ways chose goal specific marathon months future.
That goal measurable executed plan achieve that goal promise that while cannot exactly objectively prove have achieved over arching mission into this first place.
Achievable This hard some people, especially guys.
ladies tend more realistic rational when comes expectations.
know that that reality that when goals have realistic.
There nothing wrong with setting stretch goal need honest with ourselves that achieve
achieve your goals feel along that will never there, will nothing build discouragement.
Looking some upcoming goals, world record Boston Marathon, well that isn't going happen matter hard setting goal like that would either discourage more likely just unrealistic would attention trying actually achieve
stretch goal trying under hours marathon, that more realistic.
would take hard work, alignment most planets perhaps recitation ancient rituals realistic achieve.
Relevant This sort intuitive most part will take care itself when goals need make them relevant what want accomplish.
your goal lose weight setting goal make your every morning probably going whole terms achieving what trying accomplish.
want having your spouse take your kids mile every without probably going help that much.
what over arching objective what trying accomplish goal should support that objective.
Time-bound This important ensuring that goals met.
they time-bound there near-term urgency actually anything.
setting concrete date which goal must achieved allows concrete plan place achieve that goal.
probably better than infinite time accomplish something what hear that have infinite time procrastinate achievement that goal.
What typically works goal based specific running race that takes care time bound portion goal.
example, loose pounds Boston Marathon White River 2013 that gives something concrete shoot structure your plans around.
